sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
sections.text:
1. This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
(2024) (No. 2) Act, 2024.

sections.heading: On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, Supplementary
sections.text:
2. On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, Supplementary
there may be expended from the Consolidated Fund, such monies appropriation
not exceeding in the aggregate eleven billion, seven hundred and
sixty-five million, five hundred and twenty-six thousand, and four
hundred and eighty-five kwacha indicated in respect of the services
of the Republic specified in the third column of the Schedule, being
expenditure in excess of the monies appropriated for the services
of the Republic during the financial year ending on 31st December,

sections.heading: Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
sections.text:
2024.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K4.00 each.
